# Paper Thumbnails

Place paper thumbnail images here (JPG, PNG).
Naming suggestion: paper-2024-charsiu.jpg, paper-2023-nips.jpg, etc.

Then in sections/publications.html, replace each:
    <div class="pub-thumb">🧠</div>
with:
    <img class="pub-thumb" src="images/thumbnails/paper-2024.jpg" alt="Paper Title">

Recommended: 120×120px or square crop of the paper's first figure.
